title: Malay-Style Sesame Crispy Chicken
description: A flavorful and crispy chicken dish inspired by Malay cuisine, with a nutty sesame flavor.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the pan and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
In a separate pan, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of coconut oil over medium heat.
Add the toasted sesame seeds and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the cooked pilaf to the pan with the sesame seeds and stir to combine.
Add the cooked chicken to the pan with the pilaf and sesame seeds.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
